evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt:
The Command-Line File Manager

No GUI, no TUI, and no menus: just you and a powerful, file-management-oriented command line.

Install · Browse the documentation · Request feature · Report bug

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: **Clifm** is a shell-like, text-based terminal file manager that sits on the command line.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Some of its key features include: bookmarks, search, file selection, file tags, file filters, file previews (including image previews), bulk rename, archiving, trash, file opener, directory jumper, autocommands, workspaces, plugins, autosuggestions, specific command line expansions, and more. Consult the [Features](#heavy_check_mark-features) section below for a more comprehensive list.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: While feature-rich, powerful, and extensible, its true strength lies in its design philosophy. Unlike traditional terminal file managers, based on the text user interface (TUI), **clifm** embraces the command-line interface (CLI). This means you can interact with your filesystem by typing commands directly, just as you would in a regular shell, but with greater ease, speed, and advanced capabilities.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: For this reason, **clifm** does not need to be better: it's **just different!** :wink:

evidence.title: Can't open multiple files in selection
evidence.excerpt: Can't open multiple files in selection (state:open)

evidence.title: v1.27.1
evidence.excerpt: # Clifm 1.27.1 [![Download CliFM](https://a.fsdn.com/con/app/sf-download-button)](https://sourceforge.net/projects/clifm/files/v1.27.1/v1%2C27.1%20source%20code.zip/download) ### Get distro-specific binary packages from the [OpenSUSE Build System](https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Aarchcrack&package=clifm) ## Bug fixes :beetle: :bug: * If the `profiles` directory cannot be read, we get NULL pointer dereferences (possibly crashing). * `MaxFilenameLen` value lost after visiting a directory containing a single file. ## New features/Improvements :sunglasses: :godmode: * Add extraction message when extracting zip-based files (e.g., `docx` or `odt`). * Allow extracting zip-based files with **bsdtar**(1). Previosly, only **unzip**(1) and **7z**(1) were used. * Do not allow to delete the current profile (using `pf del`). * Allow profile names to start with a dot.

evidence.title: v1.27
evidence.excerpt: # Clifm 1.27 ([Pieces](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spanish_dollar) [o'Eight](https://monkeyisland.fandom.com/wiki/Pieces_o%27_Eight)) [![Download CliFM](https://a.fsdn.com/con/app/sf-download-button)](https://sourceforge.net/projects/clifm/files/v1.27/v1.27%20source%20code.zip/download) ### Get distro-specific binary packages from the [OpenSUSE Build System](https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Aarchcrack&package=clifm) ## Bug fixes :beetle: :bug: * `fzfnav/BFG` plugin: `chafa` does not display images on `foot` terminal. * Filename validation not working for uppercase file type characters (e.g. `=C`). * Cannot compile in OpenBSD 7.8-CURRENT (missing typedef). * Recursive remove message not shown when removing multiple directories. * No screen refresh after archive extraction. * `../` in a symlinked directory does not work when `cd` is omitted (`autocd`). * Directory names containing a dot are truncated as if they have an extension (sorting by extension already omits extensions in directory names). * The safe names check emits warnings only for the first error, omitting the remaining ones. * `dup FILE` replaces broken symlink if it is named `FILE.copy`. * Fi…

evidence.title: v1.26.3
evidence.excerpt: # Clifm 1.26.3 [![Download CliFM](https://a.fsdn.com/con/app/sf-download-button)](https://sourceforge.net/projects/clifm/files/v1.26.3/v1.26.3%20source%20code.zip/download) ### Get distro-specific binary packages from the [OpenSUSE Build System](https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Aarchcrack&package=clifm) ## Bug fixes :beetle: :bug: * Warning prompt color is broken. * Single character commands not recovering from warning prompt. * Run with `-T ~/trashfile`, create a file named `~/trashfile2`: this latter cannot be trashed. * Freeze when running non-interactively and in the background. * Some GTK programs crash when launched from within clifm (**XDG_DATA_DIRS** corruption). ## New features/Improvements :sunglasses: :godmode: * Replace `--stdtab`, `--fzftab`, `--fzftab`, and `--smenutab` by `--tabmode=fzf|fnf|smenu|standard`. * Prevent shell commands from leaving the terminal in an unusable state. * Improved key binding translation support (via the [keypress translation library](https://github.com/leo-arch/keypress)). * Allow the use of colon as color field separator. ## Misc * Remove `--fzytab` (deprecated since 1.12.9).
